entries.label: Version 1
entries.prompt:
Recreate the same solutions template page layout used for "Crypto Commerce":
1. Hero card (rounded, soft accent-tinted background): back link "← Back to solutions", small uppercase eyebrow label, large bold H1 headline, one-paragraph subtext.
2. "The Risk" section (two columns, light grey background): left has label "THE RISK", a large bold stat, and a short paragraph; right has a rounded accent-tinted callout card with a short bold centered uppercase phrase.
3. "Key benefits" section (white background): H2 "Key benefits", grid of rounded light-grey cards (2 per row), each with a bold title and short description.
4. Closing CTA section (light grey background): centered H2 question with a solid accent-colored button beneath.
5. Footer: centered copyright line.

Content to use:
- Eyebrow label: EMBEDDED WALLET PROTECTION
- H1: Add trusted payment protection to your existing wallet.
- Subtext: Wallet Nation enables wallet providers to embed non-custodial payment protection directly into existing wallet experiences, without rebuilding the payment stack or disrupting user flows.
- Risk label: THE RISK
- Risk stat: No custody required
- Risk paragraph: Wallets give users control, but not protection. Wallet Nation closes that gap by embedding conditional settlement directly into the wallet experience — without introducing custody.
- Callout box text: EMBEDDED PROTECTION
- Key benefit 1 — Seamless integration: Protection is embedded into the existing wallet UI and flow — no rebuilding, no re-education for users.
- Key benefit 2 — Non-custodial by design: Wallet Nation never takes custody of user funds. Protection is enforced through cryptographic control credentials.
- Key benefit 3 — Trusted user experience: Give wallet users confidence in every transaction, without changing how they already use the wallet.
- CTA headline: Ready to embed protection into your wallet?
- Button text: Talk to us
